name: 2X2 LED Troffer Light Wattage 15/20/25/30/40W 3CCT
description: The 2x2ft LED Troffer Light from ZION LED USA is a highly adaptable and energy-efficient solution designed for modern commercial interiors. Featuring selectable wattages (15/20/25/30/40W) and five adjustable color temperatures (3500K, 4000K, 5000K, 5700K, 6500K), this fixture allows you to tailor lighting to meet specific visual and environmental needs. Whether you’re outfitting an office, classroom, or retail space, this troffer delivers uniform, high-quality illumination with minimal energy use. Whether you’re upgrading from outdated fluorescent systems or designing a new energy-efficient lighting plan, The ZION LED USA 2x2ft LED Troffer Light offers superior adaptability, performance, and control. With selectable wattage and CCT, plus dimming and smart-sensor compatibility, it’s the ideal lighting solution for today’s dynamic commercial environments.
short_desc: Key Features: Wattage Selectable: Easily adjust between 15W, 20W, 25W, 30W, or 40W to suit different brightness requirements and optimize energy use. Color Temperature Selectable (CCT): Choose from 3500K (warm white) to 6500K (cool daylight) for the perfect lighting tone in any space. High Efficiency: Provides excellent lumen output with significant energy savings compared to traditional fluorescent fixtures. Uniform & Glare-Free Lighting: Delivers consistent, comfortable illumination that enhances visual comfort and reduces eye strain. Low Maintenance: Designed for longevity with minimal upkeep, reducing operational disruptions and replacement costs. Easy Installation: Fits seamlessly into standard 2×2 grid ceiling systems, making installation fast and straightforward. Certified Quality: ETL and DLC 5.1 certified for performance, safety, and rebate eligibility. Ideal Applications: Offices: Promotes focus and comfort with high-quality lighting. Classrooms: Enhances concentration and visibility in educational settings. Retail Spaces: Creates a bright, welcoming environment that showcases products effectively. Healthcare & Hospitality: Suitable for areas requiring clean, consistent, and customizable lighting.
